title: Create: Colored Casing
description: 🔨 • Adds new colored casings that can encase shafts, cogwheels and large cogwheels!
body:
> 
> _Create: Colored Casing is an addon to the **[Create Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create)**._
>
> This addon adds a wide variety of new colored casings for your builds and factories!
> 
> Of course, the casings can be encased on **shafts**, **cogwheels** and **large cogwheels**.
> 
> At the moment, it's only for the _forge modloader_.
> 
> _To see the mod recipes, please use JEI._
> 
> You can freely use this addon in your modpacks :)
